ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category for sub-categories (e.g., 'Tops' is a sub-category of 'Women's') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category the size chart is for */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is for (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "size_chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart (e.g., body measurements, garment measurements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_number" INTEGER /* Size number (e.g., 32, 34, 36) */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Bust, Waist, Hips) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement (e.g., 83cm) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands_product_categories" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_metadata" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the chart */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the chart */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the chart (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_metadata_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
